title: SPPC Patanjali Wellness Center: Ayurveda & Naturopathy Hospital

description: Experience natural healing at SPPC Patanjali Wellness Center. Trusted Ayurveda & Naturopathy hospital offering holistic treatments in Delhi.

Panchakarma Treatment Panchakarma is the main filtration and cleansing therapy. These treatments imply 5 treatments. These therapies remove toxic substances from the body, and they are: Vamana, Virechana, Basti, Shirodhara, and Nasya. Physiotherapists use a variety of methods to help their patients achieve their goals.
